mapper.sql: p.id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.customer_id, p.project_type, p.product_line, p.execute_mode, p.priority, p.status, p.current_phase, p.pm_id, p.region, p.contract_no, p.planned_start, p.planned_end, p.actual_start, p.actual_end, p.progress_pct, p.description, p.remark, p.version, p.create_time, p.update_time, c.customer_name, u.real_name AS pm_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project p LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = p.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.pm_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT id, project_code, project_name, planned_start, planned_end, progress_pct FROM project WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, phase_code, phase_name, sort_order, status, planned_start, planned_end FROM project_phase WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT t.id, t.task_name, t.phase_id, t.parent_task_id, t.status, t.assignee_id, u.real_name AS assignee_name, t.planned_start, t.planned_end FROM project_task t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.phase_id, t.id
